paths.@/lib/db: Server-only DB access. Import it from an /api route handler, not a client page or component.
paths.@prisma/client: Server-only. Use the prisma singleton from @/lib/db inside an /api route handler.
paths.server-only: Server-only marker. Belongs in /api route handlers and src/lib server code, never a client page or component.
paths.next/headers: Server-only. Read request headers in proxy.ts or a route handler, not a client page or component.
paths.@/lib/auth: Server-only better-auth instance. Gate/read the session in an /api route handler; in a client component use @/lib/auth-client (useSession).
paths.@/lib/require-admin: Server-only admin guard. Call requireAdmin() at the top of an admin Server Component (or in a route handler); never import it into a 'use client' file.
